# Staqq — IPO Intelligence & Market Signals for Indian Investors

> Staqq is India's smartest IPO tracking and market intelligence platform. It provides live Grey Market Premium (GMP) tracking with sentiment scoring, FII/DII institutional flow data, insider trading disclosures, bulk deal monitoring, and social media sentiment analysis for Indian stock markets (NSE/BSE).

## Core Features

- [IPO Hub](https://staqq.com/ipo): Live IPO dashboard with GMP tracking, subscription data, and performance analytics for all current Indian IPOs (mainboard and SME)
- [IPO Analytics](https://staqq.com/ipo/analytics): GMP distribution analysis, top gainers/losers, subscription leaderboards, and category breakdowns
- [Allotment Calculator](https://staqq.com/ipo/allotment-calculator): Calculate IPO allotment probability based on subscription multiples with multi-application strategy optimizer
- [Market Signals](https://staqq.com/signals): Social media sentiment aggregated from Reddit (r/IndianStockMarket, r/IndianStreetBets) and Twitter/X financial discussions
- [FII/DII Flows](https://staqq.com/signals/fii-dii): Daily Foreign and Domestic Institutional Investor buy/sell data from NSE
- [Insider Trades](https://staqq.com/signals/insider-trades): Promoter and insider trading disclosures (PIT) from NSE corporate filings
- [Bulk Deals](https://staqq.com/signals/bulk-deals): Large institutional bulk and block deal transactions from NSE
- [Stock Screener](https://staqq.com/stocks/screener): Filter NSE/BSE stocks by market cap, P/E ratio, sector, and fundamentals

## Key Data Points

- IPO GMP (Grey Market Premium) updated every 5 minutes
- GMP sentiment scoring: Very Bullish, Bullish, Neutral, Bearish, Very Bearish
- FII/DII flow data updated daily after market hours
- Insider trade disclosures from last 14 days
- Social sentiment from 150+ posts aggregated across platforms
- Allotment probability based on historical subscription patterns

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is IPO GMP?
IPO GMP (Grey Market Premium) is the premium at which IPO shares trade in the unofficial grey market before listing on the stock exchange. A positive GMP suggests the IPO may list above its issue price. Staqq tracks live GMP for all Indian IPOs.

### How is GMP sentiment calculated?
Staqq converts raw GMP percentages into sentiment labels: Very Bullish (GMP ≥ 50%), Bullish (10-50%), Neutral (-5% to 10%), Bearish (-20% to -5%), Very Bearish (< -20%).

### What are FII and DII?
FII (Foreign Institutional Investors) and DII (Domestic Institutional Investors) are large institutional players in Indian stock markets. Their daily buy/sell activity indicates smart money flow direction.

### How to calculate IPO allotment probability?
For a retail investor, allotment probability ≈ 1 / subscription_multiple for oversubscribed IPOs. For example, if retail category is subscribed 10x, each application has roughly 10% chance. Multiple applications from different demat accounts can improve odds using the formula: 1 - (1-p)^n.

## About
Staqq focuses exclusively on Indian financial markets (NSE and BSE). Data sources include NSE India APIs, social media aggregation, and InvestorGain for GMP data. The platform is free to use with no registration required for most features.
